summary: The Gunnery Skill has three subskills based weapon

mechanics.name_guess: The Gunnery Skill has three subskills based weapon
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 101 > npcs > The Gunnery Skill has three subskills based weapon
mechanics.excerpt: The Gunnery Skill has three subskills based weapon types and is also divided into four categories based on the way the weapon is mounted: character must pecify both the sub skill and category eacn his Gunnery Skills such Gunnery / Laser / Humanoid or Gunnery/Missile / Aero.
